title: Durvalumab with carboplatin/paclitaxel and bevacizumab followed by durvalumab and bevacizumab with or without olaparib maintenance in newly diagnosed non-BRCA-mutated advanced ovarian cancer.
abstract: Despite treatment advances in newly diagnosed advanced-stage ovarian cancer (aOC), improved outcomes are needed.
trial_name: Olaparib Plus Bevacizumab as First-Line Maintenance in Ovarian Cancer
